message:
chore: bump version to 0.1.36 for release

Fix rustfmt nit in storage/sqlite.rs, fix flaky concurrency test
(accept "schema has changed" as expected contention), and fix
list_text_output_format test to use actual issue IDs instead of
hardcoded prefixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "beads_rust"
-version = "0.1.35"
+version = "0.1.36"
 edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.88"
 description = "Agent-first issue tracker (SQLite + JSONL)"

@@ -107,7 +107,8 @@ fn is_expected_contention_failure(result: &BrResult) -> bool {
             || combined.contains("lock timeout")
             || combined.contains("timed out")
             || combined.contains("sync conflict")
-            || combined.contains("jsonl is newer"))
+            || combined.contains("jsonl is newer")
+            || combined.contains("schema has changed"))
         && !combined.contains("malformed")
         && !combined.contains("corrupt")
         && !combined.contains("constraint")
